title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hyundai India Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hyundai India Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Hyundai India Ventures Solutions in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyundai India Ventures Solutions:
Hyundai India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
